recommendations.title: Terminal Velocity
recommendations.overview: A maverick skydiver and a former KGB agent team up to stop the Russian mafia from stealing gold.

recommendations.title: Mercury Rising
recommendations.overview: Renegade FBI agent Art Jeffries protects a nine-year-old autistic boy who has cracked the government's new "unbreakable" code.

recommendations.title: Investigation of a Citizen Above Suspicion
recommendations.overview: Rome, Italy. After committing a heinous crime, a senior police officer exposes evidence incriminating him because his moral commitment prevents him from circumventing the law and the social order it protects.

recommendations.title: Ricochet
recommendations.overview: An attorney is terrorized by the criminal he put away years ago when he was a cop.

recommendations.title: Mosul
recommendations.overview: When ISIS took their homes, families and city, one group of men fought to take it all back. Based on true events, this is the story of the Nineveh SWAT team, a renegade police unit who waged a guerrilla operation against ISIS in a desperate struggle

recommendations.title: Cape Fear
recommendations.overview: Sam Bowden is a small-town corporate attorney. Max Cady is a tattooed, cigar-smoking, Bible-quoting, psychotic rapist. What do they have in common? 14 years ago, Sam was a public defender assigned to Max Cady's rape trial, and he made a serious error

recommendations.title: Target
recommendations.overview: A Texan with a secret past searches Europe with his son after the KGB kidnaps his wife.

recommendations.title: Crocodile Dundee II
recommendations.overview: Australian outback expert protects his New York love from gangsters who've followed her down under.

recommendations.title: Telefon
recommendations.overview: Nicolai Dalchimski, a mad KGB agent steals a notebook full of names of "sleeping" undercover KGB agents sent to the U.S. in the 1950's. These agents got their assignments under hypnosis, so they can't remember their missions until they're told a line

recommendations.title: The Voyagers
recommendations.overview: Time jump to 1939 with teenager Max and his friends as they try to navigate Mussolini's Rome and find Max's missing brother.
